title: apatelia lanceolata
intro: Apatelia lanceolata, commonly known as lance-leaved apatelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Apatelia lanceolata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried leaves can also be used to make capsules or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
